name: Droplets
author: Poki
description: Droplets is a puzzle game in which you will have to help the little creatures called Droplets get safely to the ground. The Droplets have gotten quite far up, and will have to jump down to safety. Luckily, they have little propellors on their heads that will make sure they'll have a smooth landing - if they can avoid all the enemies that is. This classic Flash game is now back in HTML 5 so you can play it whenever you like! Can you bring the Droplets safely to the ground? How to play Droplets? Use the mouse to drag and drop the Droplets! Who created Droplets? Droplets is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: In The Doghouse , The Bucket and Canopy How can I play Droplets for free? You can play Droplets for free on Poki. Can I play Droplets on mobile devices and desktop? Droplets can be played only on your computer.
